name: Linzer Torte Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Mix all ingredients except preserves until crumbly.
3. Press two-thirds of the mixture into an ungreased square pan, 9x9x2 inches.
4. Spread with preserves.
5. Sprinkle with remaining crumbs.
6. Gently press gently into preserves.
7. Bake for 20 to 25 minutes, or until lightly golden brown.
8. Cool completely; cut into 48 bars.
